title: Lead Instructional Designer at Schoolnet India

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Schoolnet India
jsonLd.description:
Schoolnet India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Schoolnet India:
Schoolnet India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schoolnet India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
